objects.name: v_moneyfarm_aum
objects.uc_comment: MoneyFarm AUM snapshot by date_id (YYYYMMDD int) and customer keys. External MoneyFarm feed; filter date_id. Example: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM main.etoro_kpi_prep.v_moneyfarm_aum WHERE date_id = 20251231;

objects.name: v_moneyfarm_fees
objects.uc_comment: MoneyFarm fee facts by date_id. Filter date_id for one day. Example: SELECT SUM(fee_amount) FROM main.etoro_kpi_prep.v_moneyfarm_fees WHERE date_id = 20251231;

objects.name: v_moneyfarm_mimo
objects.uc_comment: MoneyFarm MIMO (first deposit) style facts by date_id. Filter date_id. Example: SELECT * FROM main.etoro_kpi_prep.v_moneyfarm_mimo WHERE date_id = 20251231 LIMIT 50;

objects.name: silver_moneyfarm_etoro_mf_aum
objects.uc_comment:
The silver_moneyfarm_etoro_mf_aum table contains data on the portfolio investments and disinvestments, market value, risk level, and cash status of various portfolios. It also includes information on portfolio model changes and their corresponding dates, as well as the average price and calculated amount in USD. The table provides a comprehensive view of the investment performance and risk levels of different portfolios, which can be used by the business to make informed decisions on portfolio management and allocation of resources.
-- moneyfarm balance
